_notes.short_description: Max 80 chars (Google Play). Apple uses subtitle, max 30 chars.
_notes.apple_subtitle: Max 30 chars — shown under app name on App Store.
_notes.long_description: Apple: up to 4000 chars (plain text). Google: up to 4000 chars (plain text, basic HTML allowed).
_notes.keywords: Apple: 100 chars total, comma-separated. Google: does not use a keyword field (keywords are inferred from title + description).
_notes.whats_new: Apple: 4000 chars max. Google: 500 chars max.

short_description: Track daily prayers, Qur'an, dzikir, fasting & good deeds
long_description:
Istiqoma helps Muslims build consistent daily worship — one deed at a time.

Log your prayers (Sholat Fardhu), Qur'an reading, dzikir, fasting, sadaqah, and any custom ibadah. Set personal targets, earn points, maintain streaks, and watch your spiritual progress grow.

🕌 PRAYER TIMES & QIBLA
Accurate prayer times calculated for your exact location. Beautiful compass for Qibla direction. Prayer completion tracking with reminders.

📖 QUR'AN READER
Full Qur'an with Indonesian translations, multiple reciters, audio playback with verse-by-verse highlighting, bookmarks, and memorization tracking. Earn points for every verse you memorize.

📿 DZIKIR COUNTER
Beautiful tap-to-count interface for morning/evening adhkar, tasbih, tahmid, takbir, istighfar, and custom dzikir types.

🏆 STREAKS & LEADERBOARD
Maintain daily streaks, earn achievement badges, and see where you stand on the community leaderboard. Optional streak freezes let you protect your progress on difficult days.

🎯 TARGETS & GOALS
Set weekly, monthly, or one-time worship targets. Visual calendar shows your consistency. Progress bars keep you on track.

🧠 ISLAMIC QUIZ
Test and grow your Islamic knowledge with 100 questions across 10 levels. Available in English, Bahasa Indonesia, and Bahasa Melayu.

🔔 SMART REMINDERS
Personalized daily reminders and Sholat alerts timed to your local prayer schedule. Choose from gentle notification sounds.

🌙 RAMADAN & FASTING
Track fasting days, track tarawih, and log sadaqah throughout the holy month.

Istiqoma is available in English, Bahasa Indonesia, and Bahasa Melayu. Your data is private and securely stored.
whats_new:
• Full Qur'an reader with verse-by-verse audio highlighting and Quran Foundation bookmark sync
• Islamic Quiz with 100 questions in English, Indonesian, and Malay
• Dzikir counter with morning/evening adhkar
• Streak freezer — protect your streak on difficult days
• Prayer time reminders with accurate local calculation
• Performance improvements and bug fixes
